titleInfo.title: 響堂刻經洞佛名、偈讚與經典
Xiangtang Kejing Dong Fo ming, jizan yu jingdian
Buddha Names, Verses, and Sutra Texts of Sutra Cave at Xiangtang

mods.abstract: This is basically an updated version of ZhangZong2013a, which nevertheless represent the "most comprehensive treatment of the Northern Xiangtang stone inscriptions" (so writes Zhang Zong himself). Zhang has corrected errors and lacunae in his former transcriptions on the basis of Kuramoto2016a, to whom he pays tribute. The transcriptions are followed by a condensed version of his lenghty former analysis. This analysis now mostly consits of naming other sites and monuments where the respective text passage/name/verse was also carved. Moreover, his transcripts of the texts carved on the pillars are now better formatted and thus easier to understand (=> compare these transcripts with my power point on Northern Xiangtang Shan). p. 52: Zhang mentions some of the peculiarities of Northern Qi quoting habits (Henan Linzhou Honggu Si; Jian Sha; Sili Shan; Xiaonanhai).
